breaking.title: Indian-origin man Kishore Gujarati shot and injured in Portugal, probe underway
breaking.summary: In an alarming incident, Kishore Gujarati, an individual of Indian descent, sustained injuries from a shooting in Odivelas, Portugal, prompting a thorough investigation by local police. Amidst this, unverified social media accounts have claimed responsibility. Additionally, Irish authorities have reported multiple attacks on Indian residents, leading to some arrests. The investigation into the Odivelas shooting is ongoing, with police exploring various motives.

breaking.title: 2 Killed, 3 Injured As Part Of House Collapses Amid Rains In Indore
breaking.summary: The accident occurred at Khatamba village

breaking.title: Watch: Eight arrested over Ram temple donations scandal | Above the Fold | 26.06.2026
breaking.summary: From arrests over the alleged embezzlement of Ram temple donations and a standoff between Nihang Sikhs and the police in Uttarakhand, to the release of the names of servicemen who died during Operation Sindoor, the rising death toll from Venezuela’s earthquakes, revised fuel prices, higher Apple product prices, FIFA highlights, and more.

breaking.title: 17- year-old girl allegedly raped near Porur; one arrested
breaking.summary: Doctors who examined her found that she was subjected to penetrative sexual assault and they informed the police

breaking.title: US, Israel & Lebanon sign trilateral framework deal after fifth round of talks
breaking.summary: Israel, Lebanon, and the US have inked a trilateral accord to de-escalate border tensions, marking a significant step towards peace. Under the deal, Israel will withdraw from two southern Lebanese areas, with the Lebanese Armed Forces taking charge as part of a pilot security plan. Officials hailed it as a breakthrough, though challenges remain. Hezbollah has rejected the agreement, criticizing it as unilateral concessions by Lebanon.

breaking.title: Mother dies saving daughter in Venezuela earthquakes
breaking.summary: Héctor Bello wrote on social media that "you gave your own life for our daughter" in the quakes which killed at least 920 people.

breaking.title: UAE Discusses Hormuz Security With Iran In Rare Call Amid Ceasefire
breaking.summary: It was the first announced conversation between the two countries since US and Israeli strikes on Iran.

breaking.title: What we know so far
breaking.summary: The quakes killed at least 589 people and injured more than 2,980, with more feared trapped under rubble.
